","old_string":"    def for_stmt(self) -> ForStmt:
        self.consume("PUNCT", "(", message="Expected '(' after 'for'")
        if not self.match("KEYWORD", "let"):
            raise ParseError("Expected 'let' in for loop", self.peek().line, self.peek().col)
        var_name = self.consume("IDENT", message="Expected identifier in for loop").value
        self.consume("KEYWORD", "in", message="Expected 'in' in for loop")
        iterable = self.expression()
        self.consume("PUNCT", ")", message="Expected ')' after for loop header")
        body = self.block()
        return ForStmt(names=[var_name], iterable=iterable, body=body)
